source.author: SSA Catalog
source.notes: Creamy shawarma-style sauce: bold garlic, heat, and black pepper bite.

ingredients.label: Mayonnaise
notes: Use full-fat mayo for best texture.

ingredients.label: Olive oil
notes: Helps round out sharp garlic and adds body.

ingredients.label: Jalapeño, seeded and minced
notes: Adjust heat: keep seeds for hotter, or reduce amount.

ingredients.label: Black pepper, freshly ground
notes: About 1 teaspoon; increase for a stronger bite.

ingredients.label: Cayenne pepper
notes: About 1/4 teaspoon; optional for extra heat.

steps.title: Prep
instructions: If using a whole jalapeño, seed it for moderate heat (or leave some seeds for hotter). Mince very finely.
Grate or press the garlic so it disperses evenly into the sauce.

steps.title: Mix the base
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together mayonnaise and Greek yogurt until smooth.
Whisk in lemon juice, vinegar, and olive oil.

steps.title: Season
instructions: Add garlic, jalapeño, black pepper, cayenne, smoked paprika, salt, and (optional) sugar.
Whisk until fully combined, scraping the bowl to ensure no garlic clumps remain.

steps.title: Taste and adjust
instructions: Taste. Adjust heat (cayenne/jalapeño), pepper, salt, or acidity (lemon/vinegar) to your preference.
If the sauce is too thick, whisk in 1–2 teaspoons (5–10 ml) of water, a little at a time.

steps.title: Rest and store
instructions: Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes so the garlic mellows and flavors blend.
Store refrigerated in a sealed container. Use within 5–7 days.
